questions.text: Look at this series: 2, 1, (1/2), (1/4), … What number should come next?
questions.subject: Logical Reasoning

questions.text: Statement I: All the schools in the area had to be kept closed for most part of the week.Statement II: Many parents have withdrawn their children from the local schools.
questions.subject: Logical Reasoning

options.text: Statement I is the cause and statement II is its effect
Statement II is the cause and statement I is its effect
Both the statements I and II are independent causes
Both the statements I and II are effects of independent causes
Both the statements I and II are effects of some common cause

questions.text: Pointing to a photograph of a boy Person A said, “He is the son of the only son of my mother.” How is Person A related to that boy?
questions.subject: Logical Reasoning

questions.text: Statements:I. No books are pens.II. Some pens are pencils.Conclusions:I. No books are pencils.II. Some pencils are not books.
questions.subject: Logical Reasoning

questions.text: Statement:All birds are animals.Some animals are reptiles. Conclusions:I. Some birds are reptiles.II. Some reptiles are not birds.
questions.subject: Logical Reasoning

questions.text: What should be next in the series:7C, 10F, 14J, 19O
questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
